methodology: Articles sourced from Virginia-specific RSS feeds and Google News RSS, filtered for AI/technology/workforce relevance, then assessed by Claude against the scenario framework. Each article is tagged with the region it most affects and the scenario it signals toward.

signals.title: AI pressure grows on Richmond's young workforce - Axios
signals.signal_reading: Young workers feeling pressure from AI without corresponding investment in deep skill-building suggests anxiety without capability development—neither depth nor breadth is materializing, pointing toward displacement rather than empowerment.

signals.title: New partnership between VCU and AI Ready RVA aims to boost AI education, innovation and community impact - VCU News
signals.signal_reading: VCU's partnership with AI Ready RVA to boost education and community impact signals institutional commitment to distributed AI literacy beyond elite technical training, creating peer networks that could democratize capability across the metro region.

signals.title: EPA grant backs community-driven workforce training in Southwest Virginia - Virginia Tech News
signals.signal_reading: EPA-funded community-driven workforce training in Southwest Virginia represents grassroots capacity-building in an economically transitioning region, signaling potential for distributed deep learning outside traditional tech hubs if sustained.

signals.title: NoVA School Systems Grapple with AI’s Role in the Classroom - Northern Virginia Magazine
signals.signal_reading: NoVA school systems grappling with AI integration demonstrates concentrated institutional capacity to engage with frontier technology in the state's wealthiest region, while other regions lack comparable debates—deepening the metro advantage.

signals.title: Hampton Roads multiple listing service introduces AI tool to personalize home searches - The Virginian-Pilot
signals.signal_reading: Hampton Roads MLS deploying AI-powered home search tools exemplifies platform-delivered AI creating broad but shallow adoption—users gain functionality without building underlying technical capability or understanding.
